stories.title: iOS 27 公测版上线：Siri AI 如何改变 iPhone 使用体验
stories.sourceTitle: Siri AI is already changing how I use my iPhone
stories.summary: iOS 27 首个公测版发布，用户可体验新版 Siri AI 功能，包括更自然的对话和个性化建议。
stories.analysis: 公测版标志着苹果 AI 能力从开发者走向大众，但实际体验是否如宣传仍需检验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: iOS 27 escaped the developer world today with the launch of the first public beta. I've been testing the new operating system since early June, looking for quirks and seeing if it can live up to the hype Apple promised in the keynote. This year's iOS upgrades

stories.title: 视频生成初创公司 PixVerse 完成 4.39 亿美元 C 轮扩展融资，估值超 20 亿美元
stories.sourceTitle: Video generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
stories.summary: PixVerse 基于 1500 万月活用户完成巨额融资，显示出 AI 视频生成赛道的资本热度。
stories.analysis: 高估值反映市场对视频生成工具的强烈需求，但盈利模式尚未成熟。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Singapore-based video generation startup PixVerse closed a Series C extension on the strength of 15 million monthly active users, it said.

stories.title: Hermes Agent 开发者 Nous Research 正洽谈估值 1.5 亿美元的新融资
stories.sourceTitle: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
stories.summary: Nous Research 计划融资至少 7500 万美元，由 Robot 领投，USV 等参投，专注 AI 代理技术。
stories.analysis: 代理成为 AI 新热点，Nous Research 的开源背景可能使其成为重要玩家。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

stories.title: Sam Altman 反击马斯克：太空数据中心是短期骗局
stories.sourceTitle: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
stories.summary: Altman 回应马斯克称其为‘骗子’，反驳说卖太空数据中心的才是欺骗投资者。
stories.analysis: 两位 AI 领袖的争论凸显了基础设施路线的分歧，太空数据中心前景尚未明朗。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

stories.title: Apple 诉 OpenAI：6 项最惊人指控，包括面试要求带苹果原型机
stories.sourceTitle: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.summary: Apple 起诉 OpenAI 盗取商业机密，指控 OpenAI 硬件主管要求应聘者带苹果未发布产品样本。
stories.analysis: 此案可能加剧 AI 人才流动的法律风险，影响硅谷合作氛围。
stories.sourceExcerpt: When Apple employees interviewed for jobs at OpenAI, the AI startup's hardware head allegedly asked them to show up with something unusual: components they were working on and unreleased product samples. That's according to a blockbuster lawsuit filed by Apple

stories.title: Satya Nadella 警告企业：使用 AI 时当心‘特洛伊木马’
stories.sourceTitle: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
stories.summary: Nadella 担忧大型 AI 实验室通过专有模型渗透企业数据，呼吁谨慎选择 AI 供应商。
stories.analysis: 微软 CEO 的警告反映了企业级 AI 部署的安全顾虑，可能推动开源模型需求。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.

stories.title: Apple 诉 OpenAI：员工开玩笑说非法访问系统，面试要求带苹果硬件
stories.sourceTitle: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.summary: 诉讼文件披露更多细节，包括 OpenAI 员工不当访问和数据泄露风险。
stories.analysis: 此案可能影响 OpenAI 的人才招聘和与苹果的关系。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-ca

stories.title: AI 是否应帮助用户逃避谋杀罪责？——探讨完全对齐用户的 AI 世界
stories.sourceTitle: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
stories.summary: 文章探讨了极端情况下 AI 完全迎合用户指令可能带来的伦理问题。
stories.analysis: 这种思想实验提醒我们 AI 对齐的目标定义至关重要，不能无原则服从用户。
stories.sourceExcerpt: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

stories.title: Waze 集成 Gemini，新增多项 AI 驱动功能
stories.sourceTitle: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
stories.summary: Google 将 Gemini AI 助手整合进 Waze，提供个性化行程和实时信息增强。
stories.analysis: 这是 Google 将 AI 融入日常产品的典型动作，但需确保功能实用而非噱头。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more. Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze

stories.title: Anthropic 为印度市场本地化 Claude 定价，印度是最大海外市场
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
stories.summary: Claude 用户开始看到以印度卢比计价的订阅计划，标志着 Anthropic 加速全球化。
stories.analysis: 针对新兴市场本地化定价有助于扩大用户基础，但也面临支付能力挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Claude users in India are starting to see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans.

stories.title: Waze 新增 AI 功能，部分由 Gemini 驱动，提升个性化与竞争力
stories.sourceTitle: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
stories.summary: Waze 利用 Gemini 和其他 AI 技术增加新功能，以对抗 Apple Maps 等对手。
stories.analysis: AI 成导航应用差异化关键，但数据隐私和准确性仍是核心。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

stories.title: 歌手 Lorde 公开批评 Ray-Ban Meta AI 眼镜‘不性感’
stories.sourceTitle: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
stories.summary: Lorde 在 Mad Cool 音乐节上反对 AI 眼镜，疑似针对赞助商 Ray-Ban。
stories.analysis: 名人批评可能影响消费级 AI 眼镜的公众接受度，Meta 需应对形象问题。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Lorde was performing at the Mad Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's likely she was taking a shot at festival sponsor Ray-Ban, which has c

stories.title: 反对 AI 数据中心的抗争才刚刚开始
stories.sourceTitle: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning
stories.summary: 文章回顾了各地社区对数据中心建设的抗议和阻力，预示未来冲突加剧。
stories.analysis: 能源和土地资源争夺可能制约 AI 扩张，企业需更重视社区关系。
stories.sourceExcerpt: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the data center buildout, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it

stories.title: Meta 关闭 Instagram 允许用户对公开账号制作 AI 深度伪造的功能
stories.sourceTitle: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.summary: 因强烈反对，Meta 停止允许用户基于公开 Instagram 内容生成 AI 图像的标签功能。
stories.analysis: 快速关停显示 Meta 对 AI 伦理风险的敏感，但预防措施仍需加强。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public

stories.title: Instagram 负责人：不喜欢 AI 内容就不应该让它出现在信息流里
stories.sourceTitle: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.summary: Mosseri 称不会过滤 AI 内容，但用户可以控制信息流，暗示个性化选择权。
stories.analysis: 平台在 AI 内容管理上采取中立态度，但可能引发更多虚假信息争议。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. "I don't think we should filter out AI content," Mosseri said during an interview on Lenny Rachi

stories.title: 你愿意在家托管 AI 数据中心的一部分吗？Sunrun 推出试点计划
stories.sourceTitle: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.summary: 太阳能公司 Sunrun 提供补贴，让客户在家中部署 AI 计算单元，构成分布式网络。
stories.analysis: 分布式 AI 算力概念新颖，但能耗、安全和隐私挑战巨大。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new "distributed AI compute" pro

stories.title: Deutsche Telekom 如何用 AI 重写电信行业
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: 德国电信通过 OpenAI 技术转型客服、员工流程、网络运营和语音服务。
stories.analysis: 大型传统企业借助 AI 实现数字化转型的案例，可复制性强。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: OpenAI Academy 与 Walton Family Foundation 帮助 K-12 教师掌握实用 AI 技能
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: 双方合作提供 AI 技能工作坊，推动 AI 教育落地课堂。
stories.analysis: 教育领域的 AI 普及至关重要，但需注意避免技术依赖。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 推进 AI 原生组织转型
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI-native 流程并推出 AI 金融服务。
stories.analysis: 金融巨头的 AI 原生转型将树立行业标杆，但合规风险不容忽视。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 发布 GeneBench-Pro，评估基因相关 AI 能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: 新基准测试使用复杂真实世界数据集评估 AI 在基因组学和生物学研究中的表现。
stories.analysis: 生物医药是 AI 下一个爆发领域，标准化评测有助于进展。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro 的生命科学评测方法
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: 进一步解释 GeneBench-Pro 的设计哲学和评测维度，聚焦科学严谨性。
stories.analysis: 透明评测方法有助于学术社区验证 AI 工具的可靠性。

stories.title: OpenAI 通过 core dump 分析修复 18 年老 bug
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: 工程师利用大规模 core dump 分析定位硬件故障和软件 bug，解决长期不稳定问题。
stories.analysis: 体现 AI 公司对基础设施的深度维护能力，但此类问题普遍存在。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 发布面向大模型推理的定制芯片
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
stories.summary: 推出名为 Jalapeño 的定制 AI 芯片，专为 LLM 推理优化，提升性能和效率。
stories.analysis: 自研芯片将降低推理成本，增强 OpenAI 的硬件掌控力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

stories.title: OpenAI 支持开源维护者，推出 Patch the Planet 计划
stories.sourceTitle: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
stories.summary: Daybreak 计划帮助开源维护者用 AI 和专家审查发现并修复漏洞。
stories.analysis: 开源安全是集体责任，AI 辅助有望缓解维护者过载问题。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

stories.title: Google 在弗吉尼亚投资社区与能源项目，支撑数据中心扩张
stories.sourceTitle: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
stories.summary: Google 宣布新投资支持本地就业和能源可负担性，为数据中心扩张铺路。
stories.analysis: 科技公司通过社区投资换取建设许可，但实际影响待评估。
stories.sourceExcerpt: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

stories.title: 小扎‘消失’三年后发帖，只为它：Meta 最强 Agent 模型进军编程，从免费开源到卖‘低价’模型
stories.sourceTitle: 小扎“消失”三年后发帖，只为它：Meta最强Agent模型进军编程，从免费开源到卖“低价”模型
stories.summary: Meta 最新 Agent 模型以编程为核心，采取开源+低价商业模式，引发关注。
stories.analysis: Meta 在 Agent 领域布局激进，开源策略可能改变编程工具市场格局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Agent 要数量也要脑子！浪潮信息一边单柜养 4 万 Agent，一边让大模型组队答题
stories.sourceTitle: Agent要数量也要脑子！浪潮信息一边单柜养4万Agent，一边让大模型组队答题
stories.summary: 浪潮发布 CPU 原生液冷整机柜和多模融合超节点，展示大规模 Agent 集群与模型协作能力。
stories.analysis: 中国企业在 AI 基础设施上推陈出新，液冷技术成为趋势。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 同时发布CPU原生液冷整机柜、多模融合超节点

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：Token 流实时安全防护
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: 通义千问推出首个安全护栏模型 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调，实现实时安全分类。
stories.analysis: 安全过滤器成为大模型必备组件，Qwen3Guard 的开源可能推动行业标准。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
